languages.text: "Спасибо, что спасли мою жизнь, Лорд-капитан". {n}Хрипло бормочет бледный как полотно Мартинакс. Выпрямившись, он одергивает халат и низко кланяется вам.{/n} "Вы — благословение Бога-Императора, сошедшее к нам, простым смертным. Я бы благодарил вас и дальше, но мое присутствие нужно в операционной. Генетор Ферренц в плохом состоянии..."

"Thank you for saving my life, Lord Captain," {n}Martinax rasps, pale as a sheet. Straightening up, he fixes his robe and bows deeply to you.{/n} "You are a blessing of the God-Emperor descended to us mere mortals. I would thank you more, but my presence is needed in the operating chamber. Genetor Ferrenz is in grave condition..."
languages.original_text: "Спасибо, что спасли мою жизнь, Лорд-капитан". {n}Хрипло бормочет бледный как полотно Мартинакс. Я бы благодарил вас и дальше, но мое присутствие нужно в операционной. Генетор Ферренц в плохом состоянии..."

I would thank you more, but my presence is needed in the operating chamber. Genetor Ferrenz is in grave condition..."

languages.text: 「命を救ってくれてありがとう、キャプテン様」{n}マルティナクスは顔色が悪く、かすれた声で言った。彼は体を起こし、ローブを直して深く頭を下げた。「神皇帝の御恵みで、我々凡人には降臨された神聖なる存在。もっと感謝したいのですが、手術室で私の存在が必要なのです。ジェネトール・フェレンツは重篤な状態です…」{/n}
languages.original_text: "Thank you for saving my life, Lord Captain," {n}Martinax rasps, pale as a sheet. Straightening up, he fixes his robe and bows deeply to you.{/n} "You are a blessing of the God-Emperor descended to us mere mortals. I would thank you more, but my presence is needed in the operating chamber. Genetor Ferrenz is in grave condition..."

traits.locale_text: 「命を救ってくれてありがとう、神聖なる船長様」{n}マルティナクスは顔色が悪く、かすれた声で言った。彼は体を起こし、ローブを直して深く頭を下げた。「神皇帝の御恵みで、我々凡人には降臨された神聖なる存在。もっと感謝したいのですが、手術室で私の存在が必要なのです。ジェネトール・フェレンツは重篤な状態です…」{/n}

languages.text: "Hayatımı kurtardığınız için teşekkür ederim Lord Kaptan." {n}Martinax, kireç gibi bembeyaz bir hâlde hırıldıyor. Doğrularak cübbesini düzeltiyor ve önünde derin bir saygıyla eğiliyor.{/n} "Siz, Tanrı İmparator'un biz fânilere bir lütfusunuz. Size daha çok teşekkür etmek isterdim ama ameliyathaneye gitmem gerekiyor. Genetör Ferrenz'in durumu ağır..."
languages.original_text: "Thank you for saving my life, Lord Captain," {n}Martinax rasps, pale as a sheet. Straightening up, he fixes his robe and bows deeply to you.{/n} "You are a blessing of the God-Emperor descended to us mere mortals. I would thank you more, but my presence is needed in the operating chamber. Genetor Ferrenz is in grave condition..."

traits.locale_text: "Hayatımı kurtardığınız için teşekkür ederim Lord Kaptan." {n}Martinax, kireç gibi bembeyaz bir hâlde hırıldıyor. Doğrularak cübbesini düzeltiyor ve önünde derin bir saygıyla eğiliyor.{/n} "Siz, Tanrı İmparator'un biz fânilere bir lütfusunuz. Size daha çok teşekkür etmek isterdim ama ameliyathaneye gitmem gerekiyor. Genetör Ferrenz'in durumu ağır..."

languages.text: «Gracias por salvarme la vida, Lord Capitán». {n}Martinax dice con voz ronca, blanco como la nieve. Se pone firme, se limpia la túnica y se inclina profundamente ante ti.{/n} «Es una bendición de la mano del Dios Emperador en persona. Seguiría expresando mi agradecimiento, pero se requiere mi presencia en la cámara de operaciones. El Genetor Ferrenz está muy grave...».
languages.original_text: "Thank you for saving my life, Lord Captain," {n}Martinax rasps, pale as a sheet. Straightening up, he fixes his robe and bows deeply to you.{/n} "You are a blessing of the God-Emperor descended to us mere mortals. I would thank you more, but my presence is needed in the operating chamber. Genetor Ferrenz is in grave condition..."

traits.locale_text: «Gracias por salvarme la vida, Lord Capitán». {n}Martinax dice con voz ronca, blanco como la nieve. Se pone firme, se limpia la túnica y se inclina profundamente ante ti.{/n} «Es una bendición de la mano del Dios Emperador en persona. Seguiría expresando mi agradecimiento, pero se requiere mi presencia en la cámara de operaciones. El Genetor Ferrenz está muy grave...».

languages.text: “感谢您的救命之恩，舰长大人。”{n}马丁纳克斯面如白纸，嘶哑地说道。他直起身子，整理了一下长袍，向您深鞠一躬。{/n}“您真是神皇赐予我等凡人的恩典。我本该多向您表示感谢，但手术室那边需要我——基因士费伦茨目前伤情危急……”
languages.original_text: "Thank you for saving my life, Lord Captain," {n}Martinax rasps, pale as a sheet. Straightening up, he fixes his robe and bows deeply to you.{/n} "You are a blessing of the God-Emperor descended to us mere mortals. I would thank you more, but my presence is needed in the operating chamber. Genetor Ferrenz is in grave condition..."

traits.locale_text: “感谢您的救命之恩，舰长大人。”{n}马丁纳克斯面如白纸，嘶哑地说道。他直起身子，整理了一下长袍，向您深鞠一躬。{/n}“您真是神皇赐予我等凡人的恩典。我本该多向您表示感谢，但手术室那边需要我——基因士费伦茨目前伤情危急……”

languages.text: « Merci de m'avoir sauvé la vie, {mf|seigneur-capitaine|seigneure-capitaine}, » {n}déclare Martinax d'une voix rauque, blanc comme un linge. Il se redresse, puis ajuste sa robe et s'incline devant vous.{/n} « Vous êtes une bénédiction envoyée par l'Empereur-Dieu aux simples mortels que nous sommes. J'aimerais prendre le temps de vous remercier comme il se doit, mais ma présence est requise dans la salle d'opération. Le genetor Ferrenz est dans un état critique... »
languages.original_text: "Thank you for saving my life, Lord Captain," {n}Martinax rasps, pale as a sheet. Straightening up, he fixes his robe and bows deeply to you.{/n} "You are a blessing of the God-Emperor descended to us mere mortals. I would thank you more, but my presence is needed in the operating chamber. Genetor Ferrenz is in grave condition..."

traits.locale_text: « Merci de m'avoir sauvé la vie, {mf|seigneur-capitaine|seigneure-capitaine}, » {n}déclare Martinax d'une voix rauque, blanc comme un linge. Il se redresse, puis ajuste sa robe et s'incline devant vous.{/n} « Vous êtes une bénédiction envoyée par l'Empereur-Dieu aux simples mortels que nous sommes. J'aimerais prendre le temps de vous remercier comme il se doit, mais ma présence est requise dans la salle d'opération. Le genetor Ferrenz est dans un état critique... »

languages.text: "Danke, dass Ihr mir das Leben gerettet habt, Lord Captain", {n}keucht Martinax, bleich wie ein Laken. Er richtet sich auf, zupft seine Robe zurecht und verbeugt sich tief vor dir.{/n} "Ihr seid ein Segen des Gottimperators, der zu uns einfachen Sterblichen herabgestiegen ist. Ich würde Euch noch mehr danken, aber in der Operationskammer ist meine Anwesenheit erforderlich. Genetor Ferrenz ist in einem schlimmen Zustand ..."
languages.original_text: "Thank you for saving my life, Lord Captain," {n}Martinax rasps, pale as a sheet.
